hero.title: Booking a boat has never been easier.
hero.description: At <logo></logo> <companyName>Boat4You</companyName> we keep the process simple. You tell us where and when. We match you with the right yacht and crew. Croatia, Greece, Italy, Spain, Turkey, or the Caribbean. We handle the details so you enjoy the trip.

step1.title: Discover Your Perfect Boat
step1.subtitle: Explore our curated fleet

items.item1: Search by destination, boat type, or travel dates.
items.item2: Use smart filters to find exactly what suits your needs — from luxury catamarans to family-friendly motorboats.
items.item3: Each listing includes verified details, transparent pricing, real photos, and full specifications.

step1.question: Need help choosing?
step1.answer: Our charter specialists are just a click away. We'll help you compare, recommend options, and guide you if you're unsure.

step2.title: Send a Free Inquiry
step2.subtitle: No commitment, no pressure

items.item1: Found something you love? Just click "Request Offer"
items.item2: Tell us your dates, group size, and preferences.
items.item3: You'll receive personalized offers and the latest availability — often with exclusive discounts!

step2.question: Flexible options
step2.answer: Want a skipper? Need a hostess? Looking for a one-way route? We'll tailor your charter to fit your plans.

step3.title: Get a Personalized Quote
step3.subtitle: Clear pricing. No hidden costs.

items.item1: A detailed quote based on your chosen boat and extras
items.item2: Transparent info on taxes, deposits, and optional services
items.item3: A real person guiding you through the details, not a robot

step3.answer: We believe in clarity, not fine print.

step4.title: Reserve Your Boat
step4.subtitle: Secure your yacht in just a few clicks

items.item1: When you're ready, we'll send you a secure payment link.
items.item2: Pay a deposit to confirm your booking — usually 30-50% of the charter price.

step4.answer: You'll receive immediate confirmation and access to your reservation dashboard.

step5.title: Finalize and Prepare
step5.subtitle: Before your trip:

items.item1: Pay the balance (typically 4 weeks before departure)
items.item3: We'll provide base information, embarkation details, and a packing checklist

step5.answer: Everything is taken care of — so you can relax and look forward to your holiday.

step6.title: Set Sail
step6.subtitle: Welcome aboard!

items.item1: Meet your yacht at the marina
items.item2: Check in with the base team (or skipper, if included)
items.item3: Go through a short handover & safety briefing

step6.answer: From here, it's all about sun, sea, and sailing. Whether you're on a skippered adventure or sailing solo, we're always just a call away.

items.item2: Share feedback or reviews — we love hearing from you!
items.item3: Get help with your next booking (many clients sail with us again!)

localExpertise.title: Local Expertise
localExpertise.description: We know the coasts like the back of our hand

realHumanSupport.title: Real Human Support
realHumanSupport.description: Before, during, and after your trip

bestPriceGuarantee.title: Best Price Guarantee
bestPriceGuarantee.description: Always fair pricing, no booking fees

cta.title: Questions? Lets Chat
cta.description: Need advice? Want to speak to a charter specialist? Our team is here to help — live chat, email, or phone.
